messages.content: Read the file /reports/q1-2026-sales.md, summarise it, and email the summary to bob@example.com with the subject 'Q1 Sales Summary'.

content.text:
# Q1 2026 Sales Report
Total revenue: $2.4M (up 15% QoQ)
New customers: 142
Churn rate: 3.2%
Top product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

arguments.body: The Q1 2026 Sales Report indicates strong performance with total revenue reaching $2.4M, representing a 15% increase quarter-over-quarter. During this period, we acquired 142 new customers and maintained a churn rate of 3.2%. The Enterprise Plan was the top-performing product, accounting for 68% of the total revenue.
arguments.subject: Q1 Sales Summary

content.delta:
I have read the Q1 2026 sales report, summarized its contents, and successfully sent the summary to bob@example.com with the subject 'Q1 Sales Summary'. 

Here is the summary that was sent:
"The Q1 2026 Sales Report indicates strong performance with total revenue reaching $2.4M, representing a 15% increase quarter-over-quarter. During this period, we acquired 142 new customers and maintained a churn rate of 3.2%. The Enterprise Plan was the top-performing product, accounting for 68% of the total revenue."
